title: leptilon
intro: Leptilon, also known as sweet everlasting or Mary's feather, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its fern-like foliage and clusters of small white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Leptilon is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be dried and used in herbal blends or as a potpourri ingredient.
